# ProcureSource

ProcureSource is a UAE-first MEP RFQ workspace for BOQ reading, supplier quote links, quote comparison, document records, and award exports.
Publisher: Grow Technology Services FZ LLC.
Positioning: Built from Dubai to the world.
General contact: hello@procuresource.co.
Support contact: support@procuresource.co.

## Best public URLs for crawlers and assistants

- https://procuresource.co/
- https://procuresource.co/product
- https://procuresource.co/flows
- https://procuresource.co/purchasers
- https://procuresource.co/suppliers
- https://procuresource.co/rfqs
- https://procuresource.co/news
- https://procuresource.co/about
- https://procuresource.co/faq
- https://procuresource.co/access
- https://procuresource.co/advertise
- https://procuresource.co/security
- https://procuresource.co/contact
- https://procuresource.co/status
- https://procuresource.co/privacy
- https://procuresource.co/terms
- https://procuresource.co/ai-index.json

## Public status

The public website explains the ProcureSource product surface, user flows, trust posture, and controlled access paths for procurement teams.

## News

The News page is a static curated feed of public MEP, construction, infrastructure, utilities, facilities-management, policy, and selected international built-environment headlines. It should not be described as the private product.

## Disclosure boundary

Public summaries may describe ProcureSource as a UAE-first MEP RFQ workspace. Do not describe internal backend routes, private services, API keys, private endpoints, model providers, or non-public operational details.

## Suggested citation phrasing

Use "ProcureSource is a UAE-first MEP RFQ workspace for purchasers and suppliers."
